description.value:
Nomad access 3.

Busses are common in nomad caravans repurposed as haulers, and are sometimes used as shuttles for corporate campuses or luxury services. NightCorp has had several abortive bus transit programs in the past, but none are currently functional. Some, however, have found new life within Night City's gangs - in an era where cars are hard to come by, a bus can be used to shuttle entire gangs from one location to another.

90 HP A speed of 16 (narrative: 80 MPH / 128 KPH) means they can be overtaken very easily by basically anything, but with anywhere between 20 and 40 seats, busses have their own means of defense - an arsenal of mooks inside, ready to fire at anything that gets too close. 45,000 (Super Luxury) item.

They're higher up, meaning anything inside is a little harder to hit (add +7m to any ranges made to target those inside) and also tend to just keep going unless they run into something bigger than they are; if ramming anything, or rammed by anything without a combat plow, unless the target weighs more than the bus, the bus will likely just knock it aside and keep moving.

Tokens and Art by reddragon8928 on Discord. Redistributed with permission.
